title: wollastonia perdita
intro: Wollastonia perdita is a plant species commonly known as the "hairy daisy" or "painted daisy," belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wollastonia perdita include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
